howItWorks.intro: This foia response time calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Federal FOIA statutory deadline: 20 business days
Complex requests often take 2-6 months in practice
Expedited processing available for urgent need or threat to life
howItWorks.outro: Laws vary by jurisdiction and change frequently. This is not legal advice — consult a licensed attorney.

faq.question: How long does a FOIA request take?
faq.answer: The legal deadline is 20 business days for federal agencies, but actual processing often takes 2-6 months for complex requests. Some agencies have backlogs exceeding a year. Simple requests are faster.

faq.question: How do I file a FOIA request?
faq.answer: Federal: submit to the agency's FOIA office (most accept online). Be specific about what you want. Include date ranges, names, and topics. Vague requests take longer. Each agency has its own portal and process.

faq.question: Can a FOIA request be denied?
faq.answer: Yes, under 9 exemptions including national security, personal privacy, trade secrets, and law enforcement. Agencies must specify which exemption applies. You can appeal denials administratively and then sue in federal court.

faq.question: Is the FOIA Response Time Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the FOIA Response Time Calculator?
sections.body: The FOIA Response Time Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your agency type, request complexity, you get instant results including estimated response time, legal deadline, appeal window if denied. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting estimated response time right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your agency type and need to find the right estimated response time. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
